languages.text: "Мы присягнем вам, наследни{mf|к|ца} Себериана, обязательно. Но для начала нам стоит убедиться, что вы действительно несете в себе кровь благородного Вольного Торговца. Мы, может, и одичали, но разум не растеряли и судить привыкли по делам".

traits.locale_text: "Мы присягнем вам, наследни{mf|к|ца} Себериана, обязательно. Но для начала нам стоит убедиться, что вы действительно несете в себе кровь благородного Вольного Торговца. Мы, может, и одичали, но разум не растеряли и судить привыкли по делам".
traits.speaker: IzhdrigBatoshskiColonel

languages.text: "We will swear our oaths to you, heir of Seberian, no doubt. But first, we must be certain that the blood of the noble Rogue Trader truly runs through your veins. We may have gone feral, but we haven't lost our wits, and we're accustomed to judging people by their deeds."
languages.original_text: "Мы присягнем вам, наследни{mf|к|ца} Себериана, обязательно. Но для начала нам стоит убедиться, что вы действительно несете в себе кровь благородного Вольного Торговца. Мы, может, и одичали, но разум не растеряли и судить привыкли по делам".

traits.locale_text: "We will swear our oaths to you, heir of Seberian, sure thing. But first, we must be certain that the blood of the noble Rogue Trader truly runs through your veins. We may have gone feral, but we haven't lost our wits, and we're accustomed to judging people by their deeds."

"We will swear our oaths to you, heir of Seberian, no doubt. But first, we must be certain that the blood of the noble Rogue Trader truly runs through your veins. We may have gone feral, but we haven't lost our wits, and we're accustomed to judging people by their deeds."

languages.text: "Wir werden unseren Eid vor Euch ablegen, {mf|Erbe|Erbin} von Seberian, so steht fest. Aber zuerst müssen wir sicher sein, dass in Euren Adern wirklich das Blut des edlen Freihändlers fließt. Wir mögen verwildert sein, aber wir haben noch immer unseren Verstand und sind es gewohnt, Leute nach ihren Taten zu beurteilen."
languages.original_text: "We will swear our oaths to you, heir of Seberian, no doubt. But first, we must be certain that the blood of the noble Rogue Trader truly runs through your veins. We may have gone feral, but we haven't lost our wits, and we're accustomed to judging people by their deeds."

traits.locale_text: "Wir werden unseren Eid vor Euch ablegen, {mf|Erbe|Erbin} von Seberian, so steht fest. Aber zuerst müssen wir sicher sein, dass in Euren Adern wirklich das Blut des edlen Freihändlers fließt. Wir mögen verwildert sein, aber wir haben noch immer unseren Verstand und sind es gewohnt, Leute nach ihren Taten zu beurteilen."

languages.text: « Nous allons vous prêter serment, {mf|héritier|héritière} de Seberian, c'est un fait. Mais avant, nous devons nous assurer que le sang du noble libre-marchand coule vraiment dans vos veines. Nous sommes peut-être retournés à l'état sauvage, mais nous n'avons pas encore perdu l'esprit et nous avons coutume de juger les gens sur leurs actes. »
languages.original_text: "We will swear our oaths to you, heir of Seberian, no doubt. But first, we must be certain that the blood of the noble Rogue Trader truly runs through your veins. We may have gone feral, but we haven't lost our wits, and we're accustomed to judging people by their deeds."

traits.locale_text: « Nous allons vous prêter serment, {mf|héritier|héritière} de Seberian, c'est un fait. Mais avant, nous devons nous assurer que le sang du noble libre-marchand coule vraiment dans vos veines. Nous sommes peut-être retournés à l'état sauvage, mais nous n'avons pas encore perdu l'esprit et nous avons coutume de juger les gens sur leurs actes. »

languages.text: «No dude de que le prestaremos juramento, hereder{mf|o|a} de Seberian, pero primero debemos asegurarnos de que por sus venas corre la sangre del noble Comerciante Independiente. Nos habremos asilvestrado, pero no nos hemos vuelto locos, y juzgamos a la gente por sus acciones».
languages.original_text: "We will swear our oaths to you, heir of Seberian, no doubt. But first, we must be certain that the blood of the noble Rogue Trader truly runs through your veins. We may have gone feral, but we haven't lost our wits, and we're accustomed to judging people by their deeds."

traits.locale_text: «No dude de que le prestaremos juramento, hereder{mf|o|a} de Seberian, pero primero debemos asegurarnos de que por sus venas corre la sangre del noble Comerciante Independiente. Nos habremos asilvestrado, pero no nos hemos vuelto locos, y juzgamos a la gente por sus acciones».

languages.text: "Yeminlerimizi edeceğiz Seberian'ın vârisi. Bundan şüpheniz olmasın. Ancak önce damarlarınızda soylu Hür Tacir'in kanının gerçekten aktığından emin olmalıyız. Vahşi olabiliriz ama aklımızı yitirmedik. İnsanları eylemlerine göre yargılamaya alışkınız."
languages.original_text: "We will swear our oaths to you, heir of Seberian, no doubt. But first, we must be certain that the blood of the noble Rogue Trader truly runs through your veins. We may have gone feral, but we haven't lost our wits, and we're accustomed to judging people by their deeds."

traits.locale_text: "Yeminlerimizi edeceğiz Seberian'ın vârisi. Bundan şüpheniz olmasın. Ancak önce damarlarınızda soylu Hür Tacir'in kanının gerçekten aktığından emin olmalıyız. Vahşi olabiliriz ama aklımızı yitirmedik. İnsanları eylemlerine göre yargılamaya alışkınız."

languages.text: “我们当然会向您宣誓效忠，塞贝里安的继承人。但在那之前，我们得确认，您血管里流淌的确实是那位高贵行商浪人的血脉。我们也许变野蛮了，但还没丢掉脑子，而且我们习惯用行动来评判一个人。”
languages.original_text: "We will swear our oaths to you, heir of Seberian, no doubt. But first, we must be certain that the blood of the noble Rogue Trader truly runs through your veins. We may have gone feral, but we haven't lost our wits, and we're accustomed to judging people by their deeds."

traits.locale_text: “我们当然会向您宣誓效忠，塞贝里安的继承人。但在那之前，我们得确认，您血管里流淌的确实是那位高贵行商浪人的血脉。我们也许变野蛮了，但还没丢掉脑子，而且我们习惯用行动来评判一个人。”

languages.text: 「シベリアの相続人であるあなたに、我々は誓いを立てるであろう。しかし、まず、貴方の血筋に、名高いローグ・トレーダーの血が流れていることを確かめなければならない。我々は狂気に染まったかもしれないが、我々の知恵は失われていない。我々は行動によって人を判断する習慣があるのだ。」
languages.original_text: "We will swear our oaths to you, heir of Seberian, no doubt. But first, we must be certain that the blood of the noble Rogue Trader truly runs through your veins. We may have gone feral, but we haven't lost our wits, and we're accustomed to judging people by their deeds."

traits.locale_text: 「シベリアの相続人であるあなたに、我々は誓いを立てるであろう。しかし、まず、貴方の血筋に、名高いローグ・トレーダーの血が流れていることを確かめなければならない。我々は狂気に染まったかもしれないが、我々の知恵は失われていない。我々は行動によって人を判断する習慣があるのだ。」
